credentials.heading: Credential Verification
credentials.no_credentials_desc: Upload your volunteer credentials to get them verified and boost your profile.
credentials.expiring_soon_desc: {{count}} credential(s) will expire within 30 days. Consider renewing them to maintain your verified status.
credentials.upload_instructions: Upload a document to verify your credential. Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP (max 10MB).
credentials.click_to_browse: Click to browse or drag and drop
credentials.file_types: PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 10MB
credentials.load_failed: Failed to load credentials. Please try again.
credentials.load_error: Unable to load credentials. Please try again.
credentials.invalid_file_type: Please upload a PDF or image file (JPG, PNG, WebP).
credentials.upload_failed: Failed to upload credential. Please try again.
credentials.upload_error: An error occurred while uploading. Please try again.

swaps.heading: Shift Swaps
swaps.no_sent: You have not sent any shift swap requests yet.
swaps.no_received: You have not received any shift swap requests.
swaps.no_swaps_desc: No shift swap requests found. You can request a swap from the shift details page.
swaps.load_error: Unable to load shift swap requests. Please try again.
swaps.accept_failed: Failed to accept swap request. Please try again.
swaps.reject_failed: Failed to decline swap request. Please try again.
swaps.reject_confirm: Are you sure you want to decline this swap request?

waitlist.heading: My Waitlists
waitlist.no_entries_desc: You are not currently on any shift waitlists. When a shift is full, you can join the waitlist and be notified when a spot opens up.
waitlist.load_error: Unable to load your waitlist entries. Please try again.
waitlist.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this waitlist? You will lose your position.
waitlist.leave_failed: Failed to leave waitlist. Please try again.

wellbeing.heading: Volunteer Wellbeing
wellbeing.no_data_desc: Start logging your mood and tracking your volunteer wellness.
wellbeing.rest_days_desc: Based on your recent activity, we recommend taking a break on these days:
wellbeing.needs_attention_desc: Your wellbeing score is below the healthy threshold. Consider taking some time off and reaching out to your community coordinator if you need support.
wellbeing.checkin_desc: Take a moment to check in with yourself. Your responses help us suggest when you might need a break.
wellbeing.checkin_failed: Failed to submit check-in. Please try again.
wellbeing.load_error: Unable to load wellbeing data. Please try again.
wellbeing.note_placeholder: How's your energy level? Anything on your mind?
wellbeing.tip_breaks: Take regular breaks between volunteer shifts
wellbeing.tip_connect: Connect with fellow volunteers for support
wellbeing.tip_celebrate: Celebrate your impact -- every hour counts
wellbeing.tip_reduce: Consider reducing frequency if feeling overwhelmed

organisations.heading: Organisations
organisations.subtitle: Discover volunteer organisations in your community
organisations.error_load_retry: Failed to load organisations. Please try again.
organisations.register_subtitle: Register your volunteer organisation to post opportunities and manage volunteers
organisations.form_name_min_length: Name must be at least 3 characters
organisations.form_description_placeholder: Describe your organisation, its mission, and the type of volunteering work you do...
organisations.form_description_min_length: Description must be at least 20 characters
organisations.form_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
organisations.form_website_invalid: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
organisations.form_save_error: Failed to register organisation. Please try again.
organisations.form_success_message: Your organisation has been submitted for review. An admin will approve it shortly.
organisations.pending_approval_notice: Your organisation is pending admin approval. Once approved, it will appear publicly and you can post volunteer opportunities.
organisations.terms_item_1: I confirm this is a legitimate organisation engaged in volunteering, community service, charity work, or non-profit activities.
organisations.terms_item_2: The information I provide is accurate and I am authorised to register this organisation on the platform.
organisations.terms_item_3: I understand that the organisation will be reviewed by an administrator before it is publicly listed.
organisations.terms_item_4: I agree to use the platform responsibly and ensure all volunteer opportunities posted are genuine and lawful.
organisations.terms_item_5: I understand that the platform administrators may remove the organisation or its listings if they violate community guidelines.
organisations.terms_agreement: I have read and agree to the organisation registration terms above.
organisations.terms_required: You must agree to the terms to register your organisation.

organisation_detail.error_load_retry: Failed to load organisation details. Please try again.
organisation_detail.no_opportunities_description: This organisation has no open volunteer opportunities right now
organisation_detail.cover_message_placeholder: Tell the organisation why you'd like to volunteer...

group_signups.heading: Group Sign-ups
group_signups.no_signups_desc: You are not part of any group shift reservations yet. Group sign-ups let you volunteer together with friends or team members.
group_signups.load_failed: Failed to load group reservations. Please try again.
group_signups.load_error: Unable to load group reservations. Please try again.
group_signups.add_member_desc: Enter the email address of the person you would like to add to this group reservation. They will receive an invitation to join.
group_signups.add_member_failed: Failed to add member. They may already be in the group or the email is invalid.
group_signups.add_member_error: Unable to add member. Please check the email and try again.

certificates_tab.description: Certificates include all of your approved volunteer hours across every organisation.

certificates_tab.no_verified_hours: No verified volunteer hours found. Hours must be approved before generating a certificate.
